headline: OPEC crude output drops to lowest level in 37 years
summary: Investing.com -- OPEC crude production fell in May to its lowest level in at least 37 years as a US blockade of Iran and disruptions in the Persian Gulf continued to limit output, according to a Bloomberg survey released Friday.
